title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Parle Products South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Parle Products South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Parle Products South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Parle Products South Asia Partners:
Parle Products South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products South Asia Partners!
